pi_items.verified_value: Solent is a real environment model available in Bridge Command, a charted estuary training area between England and Isle of Wight
pi_items.source: https://www.bridgecommand.co.uk/, github.com/bridgecommand/bc-world documentation confirming Solent as available training scenario

pi_items.verified_value: 8.0 is a valid visibility parameter in nautical miles for Bridge Command environment.ini files
pi_items.source: https://www.bridgecommand.co.uk/Doc/4.7/Scenario.php documentation showing VisibilityRange measured in nautical miles

pi_items.verified_value: 3.0 is within the valid Bridge Command weather scale (0-12, where 0=best conditions, 12=worst)
MV Pacific Trader is a real container ship with IMO 9406922, MMSI 210749000, flagged under Cyprus
10.0 knots is reasonable approach speed for a container ship. The MV Pacific Trader was recorded at 11.7 knots in AIS data
pi_items.source: MarineTraffic vessel tracking data for MV Pacific Trader

pi_items.verified_value: MV Ever Forward is a real container ship (IMO 9850551) flagged Singapore, built 2020. Vessel type and role confirmed as container ship

pi_items.key: Solent Spirit vessel type and role
pi_items.verified_value: SD Solent Spirit (IMO 8748622) is a PILOT VESSEL, not a ferry. It is a specialized vessel for piloting operations, not passenger crossing transport
No specific vessel named 'FV Doreen' found in public maritime databases. Only 'DOREEN T' (fishing vessel, MMSI 235102454) identified. Vessel may be fictional or unverifiable in public records
Svitzer is a real international harbor tug operator with 446 vessels, but no specific vessel named 'Svitzer Doris' found in public databases
pi_items.source: https://svitzer.com/ company information, MarineTraffic fleet searches

pi_items.verified_value: No specific pilot boat named 'Doris T' confirmed. Historical references exist to vessels named Doris in UK maritime history, but no current or recent pilot boat with this exact name identified
pi_items.source: https://www.nationalhistoricships.org.uk, extensive pilot vessel and boat database searches

pi_items.verified_value: arpa_on=1 is a valid Bridge Command radar configuration setting that enables ARPA (Automatic Radar Plotting Aid)
full_radar=1 is a valid Bridge Command setting that maximizes the radar display
256 is a valid radar range resolution value for Bridge Command configurations
pi_items.source: Bridge Command configuration documentation and task setup scripts

pi_items.verified_value: 72 nautical miles is a reasonable maximum radar range for Bridge Command marine simulation
pi_items.source: Bridge Command radar configuration defaults and documentation

pi_items.verified_value: IMO Resolution A.1045(27) is a real maritime standard adopted November 30, 2011, concerning 'Recommendation on Pilot Transfer Arrangements'
These coordinates are approximately in the Solent area (verified Solent location: ~50.7853N, 1.2903W). Coordinates are close and reasonable for Solent operations
Maritime pilotage standards specify 8 knots as the standard boarding speed, not 6 knots. Sweden and Brunswick pilot operations reference 8 knots
VHF channels 12 and 9 are standard pilotage communication channels. Channel 80 is a working channel in some regions
pi_items.source: Maritime VHF standards and IMO recommendations

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic pilot boarding exercise scenario in Bridge Command's Solent environment. The Solent is a real geographic location (strait between England and Isle of Wight) available as a trained scenario in Bridge Command. MV Pacific Trader and MV Ever Forward are real container ships (IMO 9406922 and 9850551 respectively). The scenario uses real maritime standards including IMO Resolution A.1045(27) for pilot boarding arrangements, and realistic coordinates approximately 50.775N, 1.060W within the Solent area. However, the SD Solent Spirit is a pilot vessel, not a ferry/crossing vessel as claimed in the task description. Additionally, standard maritime pilot boarding speed is 8 knots, not 6 knots as specified. Vessel names 'Svitzer Doris', 'FV Doreen', and 'Doris T' could not be verified in public maritime records and may be fictional. The scenario configuration parameters (radar settings arpa_on=1, full_radar=1, visibility=8.0nm, weather=3.0) are all valid Bridge Command settings.
